title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. scabrida
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. scabrida, also known as bentgrass or creeping bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the Northern Hemisphere. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Agrostis stolonifera subsp. scabrida can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
